description.en: research, draft, and send your newsletter — without leaving the terminal
description.zh: 从素材研究到发送，全程在终端完成你的 Newsletter

outcome.en: Summarize the week's best articles into post ideas, draft issues in Notion, promote on X, and send to subscribers via Gmail — a complete weekly publishing workflow in one agent.
outcome.zh: 把本周最佳文章汇总成写作素材，在 Notion 起草期刊，在 X 推广，通过 Gmail 发送给订阅者——一个 Agent 完成完整的每周发布流程。

reason.en: Digest articles, threads, and research papers into tight summaries — the raw material for every issue.
reason.zh: 把文章、帖子和研究论文提炼成简洁摘要——每一期的原始素材。

en: Summarize the 5 most interesting AI articles from this week
TL;DR this research paper for a non-technical audience
Give me 3 key takeaways from this product launch
zh: 摘要本周最有价值的 5 篇 AI 文章
为非技术读者 TL;DR 这篇研究论文
提炼这次产品发布的 3 个核心要点

reason.en: Draft and structure each issue in Notion — keep a content backlog, outline sections, and finalize before sending.
reason.zh: 在 Notion 起草和整理每一期内容——维护内容积压、规划章节结构，发送前完成定稿。

en: Create a new newsletter draft in Notion for this week
Add these 3 summaries to my newsletter backlog
Show me what's in my newsletter drafts
zh: 在 Notion 新建本周 Newsletter 草稿
把这 3 个摘要加入我的 Newsletter 素材库
查看我的 Newsletter 草稿列表

reason.en: Send the finished issue to your subscriber list via Gmail and track replies — close the loop on every edition.
reason.zh: 通过 Gmail 向订阅者名单发送成品期刊并追踪回复——每期都有始有终。

en: Send this newsletter draft to my subscriber list
How many replies did last week's newsletter get?
Draft a re-engagement email for inactive subscribers
zh: 把这期 Newsletter 草稿发给订阅者名单
上周的 Newsletter 收到了多少回复？
为不活跃订阅者起草一封重新激活邮件

reason.en: Tease each issue on X to drive signups — post a thread with the top 3 insights before the full edition goes out.
reason.zh: 在 X 上预告每一期内容以吸引订阅——在完整版发出前发布包含 3 个核心洞察的推文串。

en: Post a teaser thread for this week's newsletter
Check X engagement on my last newsletter promo
Draft 3 tweet ideas from this week's issue
zh: 发布本周 Newsletter 的预告推文串
查看上期 Newsletter 推广的 X 互动数据
从本期内容提炼 3 个推文思路

installAll: clawhub install openclaw/summarize openclaw/notion openclaw/gog openclaw/xurl
